title: Aurora, 33778, Palm Pals Fallon Flower 5In, Soft Toy, Multicolour
features: Introducing Palm Pals Fallon Flower, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Fallon is known as the best flower to have ever bloomed. From his perfect petals to that sweet smile, Fallon fills the room with grace. Anyone with a green thumb would be proud to have this little flower a part of their garden. Fallon Flower is a cute and cuddly multi-coloured soft toy filled with beans that fit comfortably in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Fallon Flower is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable flower-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Whimsical collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Critters, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Fallon Flower measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable multi-coloured flower which has a cute smiling face. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
